leadText: The Enigmatic Card (Japanese: あやしいカード Suspicious Card) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII. It allows the player to enter the International Police's motel room on Route 8.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Allows the player to enter Looker and Anabel 's motel room on Route 8 .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method S M Route 1 (from a man in front of the player's house after entering the Hall of Fame )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A mysterious card. Written on it is a request for you to go to a guest room in an Akala motel on Route 8. S V A mysterious card. Written on it is a request that you go to a guest room in the motel on Akala Island's Route 8.
